title: Metering Event
description: Metering event following the CloudEvents specification.

source.description: Identifies the context in which an event happened.

specversion.description: The version of the CloudEvents specification which the event uses.

type.description: Contains a value describing the type of event related to the originating occurrence.

datacontenttype.description: Content type of the CloudEvents data value. Only the value "application/json" is allowed over HTTP.

dataschema.description: Identifies the schema that data adheres to.

subject.description: Describes the subject of the event in the context of the event producer (identified by source).

time.description: Timestamp of when the occurrence happened. Must adhere to RFC 3339.
time.title: RFC3339 Date-Time

data.description:
The event payload.
Optional, if present it must be a JSON object.
